{{Quote|And if that were not enough to deter the bold, there are the legends of Grendel, a monstrous worm of uncanny cunning, a hater of men and eater of ships.|''[[The Slug Named Grendel]]'' by [[Rogar Farnoster]]|<ref name="Grendel" />}}
'''Grendel''', the great [[Exogorth/Legends|space slug]], was the antagonist of [[Rogar Farnoster]]'s seminal work ''[[The Slug Named Grendel]]''. He was the target of [[Flandon Sweeg]], a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who sought the great slug in its home in the [[Borkeen Belt]]. He was regarded by many as a legend only, monstrous in size, remarkably cunning, and known to hate men and [[Starship/Legends|starships]] alike.
